definition:
Someone descended from Senaah (H5570) of the tribe of Levi before time of Exile and Return, first mentioned at 1Ch.9.7; including Hodaviah (H1938I) and Judah (H3063I); also called Hassenaah at Neh.3.3
Also named: se.na.ah (סְנָאָה "Hassenaah" H5570H) 
 § Senuah or Hasenuah [with the art] = "bristling"
 a Benjamite
